title: Makeup Spatula, Mini Silicone Spatula, Make Up Spatula Tool, Mini Spatula for Cosmetics, Last Drop Spatula, Makeup Spatulas to Get Last of Makeup Out, Jar Scraper Spatula, Mini Makeup Spatula, Black
description:
About this item
Makeup spatulas to get last of makeup out -- When you pay good money for skincare, you want to make sure to get the last drop out of those tiny bottles --- and these makeup spatulas do just that! The make up spatula head is narrow, it will fit any tiny opening.
Safe material -- Well-made and flexible Make up spatulas are made of food-grade silicone with a stainless steel core inside, good toughness, BPA-FREE, safe, and healthy.
Easy to clean -- Mini spatula for cosmetics can be cleaned just by the water, also dishwasher available. One-piece seamless design for the makeup scoop spatula, no hiding dirt.
Widely application -- Makeup spatula silicone one side is a spatula, and the other side is a spoon, It has a wide range of applications: cosmetic, makeup foundation, ketchup, mask, oils, mayonnaise, shampoo bottle, lotion spatula, and so on.
Packing includes -- 1 × Small tiny spatula, 1 × Medium spatula, and 2 × Large long spatulas. Different sizes of last drop spatula meet all your needs.
After-sales service -- We will conduct strict quality inspection on each product spatula. If you find any quality problems after receiving the rubber makeup spatula, please contact us first, 30 days refund.
reviews_5s:
I should have paid attention to the product description. These things are way larger/longer than I initially wanted!

But I got lucky! I found them to be super useful.

Two are the same size, and the two others are a bit shorter. The silicone is smooth and easy to clean. The handle rod is sturdy. The spoon head is ultra flexible. I initially thought it was pretty flimsy, but I found that the flexibility is very handy. As is the firm spatula head.

I was looking for cosmetic spatulas that were at least half the size of the longest ones. But I saw the great price on this item and immediately added it to my cart without reviewing the description.

I'm glad I got these because I have several tall bottles of pricey body lotion, where a lot of the product gets stuck to the bottom. It's a huge design flaw for such an expensive product. I end up having to take off the pump lid so I can slap the bottle on my hand to get the last 6-7 portions out. Even that method is not really effective. So, to get as much of it as possible, I've always resorted to adding water and diluting the lotion so it'll pour out more easily. This ends up making it not as good.

Enter these spatulas! I was able to scoop out the thick lotion with ease. No worries about sanitary issues.

I've just washed an old hair mask jar out, and I'm currently scooping lotion from 3 bottles into it. There's so much product that would have gone to waste. The flexible spoon is allowing me to scoop up every bit of the lotion. The spatula head is useful for collecting all the product from the sides and crevices.

These things are a great investment. I'll probably be tackling some bottles of hair products after this.

NOTE: In my photos, I'm pushing the spoon and spatula heads down on the Amazon envelope, which laying on top of a very light and fluffy blanket. The spoon head is very flexible.These little guys are super helpful! Now I don’t have to spend hours doing annoying bottle adaptations off of Pinterest! This is a super simple, effortless way to get every drop out of the lotion bottle!I didn’t realize they would be that long, I used my chapstick for reference for size, still satisfied though!Exactly what I needed to get all the content from my lotion. Not as flimsy as other users claims it to be.I’ve used these for everything thanks to the variety of sizes. Great product, glad I ordered a pack with more than just the 2 I actually needed.I have a huge bottle of hand lotion with a pump and I can't use the pump anymore, because it won't reach, but now I have been able to get at least 4 months more use out of the bottle with the long one reaching the sides of the bottle!! I also use the shorter one to scoop out my moisturizer from a jar and not get it contaminated or get lotion under my long fingernails. Saves me a lot of money.I use to get the last bit of product out of tubesThese are a must have if you like getting the most out of your products.
I’ve been able to get out 3-6 extra uses of hand creams from what looks like an empty tube.
Don’t wash in dishwasher though because it gets soap residue that is hard to wash off. Hand wash only.Been using these for a bit now and am very happy with it. The spatula end is sturdy, the middle handle portion is a rod, and the spoon is flexible. Others have complained about how the spoon end is too flimsy/flexible, but I don't find it to be a problem at all. I'm not trying to scoop out ice cream or anything like that, so it works perfectly fine. Can easily scoop out the last bits of product, easy to clean, and doesn't stain.My niece told me about these spatulas and I'm delighted that I bought them! They truly are useful for tiny jars and spaces. I finally can use the remains on the bottom of expensive moisturizers and cosmetic containers!!! Great buy!
reviews_1s:
The support inside the spatula only goes down to the spatula end.
The spoon end has no support at all so putting that spoon in a bottle and trying to get cream out of it doesn't work very well at all.
The spoon just bends right over 90°.
I tried all 4 spoons and it is the same for all.
Spatulas are good, spoons not good.
Need to find a product that is supported on both ends.Horrible and sending back this was supposed to be a mini product and it’s huge.
